results.title: 11 Best Flodesk Alternatives 2026 | Mailsoftly
results.content:
Key Takeaways

## What are the best Flodesk alternatives?

The best Flodesk alternatives are Mailsoftly, Kit, Mailchimp, Brevo, ActiveCampaign, Constant Contact, Klaviyo, and HubSpot. The right one depends on your list size, how much automation you need, and whether you want a free plan or flat pricing. The table below compares all eight on price, free plan, support, and ideal use case. [...] ### TEMPLATES

mailsoftly-logo

Flodesk’s flat rate looks simple until your list grows and you need real automation, segmentation, and human support that scales with you.

Alkan Balkaya
Alkan Balkaya

# Flodesk Alternatives: The Best Options for Growing Email Lists

The best Flodesk alternatives are Mailsoftly, Kit, Mailchimp, Brevo, and ActiveCampaign. Mailsoftly suits businesses wanting transparent pricing and real automation, Kit fits creators, Brevo wins on high-volume sending, and ActiveCampaign goes deepest on automation logic. Each scales further than Flodesk’s flat-rate, design-first model. Mailsoftly offers a free plan with 500 contacts and 2,000 emails per month, paid plans from $39 per month billed annually, and free hands-on migration. [...] ### Best for small businesses and value: Mailsoftly

Mailsoftly is the strongest all-around Flodesk replacement for businesses that want power without complexity. It pairs a drag-and-drop builder and clean templates with automation, segmentation, and reporting that go well beyond Flodesk, all at transparent prices that start free. Every plan includes human support, and the platform is built on Mailsoftly’s AI-powered email marketing software so you can draft, segment, and optimize campaigns faster. For most teams leaving Flodesk because they have outgrown it, this is the path of least friction.

### Best for creators: Kit

results.title: systeme.io | The best free Flodesk alternative
results.content:
For beautiful email design alone, Flodesk is hard to beat — it's built around stunning templates and a clean visual editor. For businesses that also need to sell products, build funnels, and automate their marketing, systeme.io is the stronger choice. systeme.io includes a funnel builder with upsells and order bumps, course hosting, affiliate management, and automation — all connected to your email list, all on the free plan. Flodesk is email only; to add funnels and selling, you'd need separate paid tools on top of your Flodesk subscription.

What does systeme.io have that Flodesk doesn't? [...] ## Is systeme.io a good Flodesk alternative?

Systeme.io is a free Flodesk alternative for creators who want more than email design. Flodesk's free plan lets you collect subscribers but won't let you send marketing emails or accept payments, while systeme.io's free plan includes unlimited email sends, automation workflows, and native Stripe and PayPal checkout. Beyond email, systeme.io adds sales funnels, online courses, and a built-in affiliate program, none of which Flodesk offers at any tier.

results.title: 10 Best Flodesk Alternatives for Email Marketing in 2026
results.content:
Mailerlite vs Flodesk comparison

### 3. EmailOctopus

You might not expect a budget-friendly platform like EmailOctopus to impress on design, but it actually does a pretty decent job. With over 100 templates (109 to be exact), you’ll find plenty of clean, modern designs that could easily rival Flodesk’s. Plus, EmailOctopus goes the extra mile by offering to set up four branded templates for you, helping you stay on-brand without lifting a finger.

Beyond its looks, what makes EmailOctopus stand out is its simplicity and affordability. It’s refreshingly easy to use, with a clean editor that makes building and sending emails feel effortless. You won’t get overwhelmed with too many bells and whistles – it’s really designed for those who just want to send beautiful emails without much fuss. [...] #### What Sets EmailOctopus Apart from Flodesk?

While both tools focus on easy-to-use editors and stylish templates, EmailOctopus stands out for being far more affordable, especially with its free plan and nonprofit discount. It also gives you access to over 100 pre-designed templates, plus four branded templates created for your business — something Flodesk doesn’t offer.

Try EmailOctopus for free

### 4. Beehiiv

Beehiiv is a newsletter platform designed specifically for creators, writers, and independent publishers looking to grow and monetize their audience. Beehiiv offers powerful tools for growth, monetization, and analytics, making it a top choice for content creators aiming to turn their passion into profit.

flodesk alternatives

Since its launch in 2019, Flodesk has gained popularity for its visually stunning templates, clean, minimalist interface, and user-friendly design. It’s quickly become a go-to email marketing platform for bloggers, creatives, and affiliate marketers who value aesthetics and simplicity in their newsletters.

results.title: My Flodesk Review: Comparing Flodesk vs Kit vs Klaviyo
results.content:
HubSpot: Usually used by larger businesses or B2B companies that need robust CRM, marketing automation, and sales tools all in one (and have the budget to match).
 Brevo (formerly Sendinblue): Usually used by service-based businesses or European companies who want email + SMS in one place, with solid GDPR compliance features.
 Omnisend: Usually used by e-commerce shops looking for a simpler, lower-cost alternative to Klaviyo with solid automation and SMS/email integration.
 ActiveCampaign: Usually used by online businesses and tech-savvy marketers who want advanced automation and CRM features—without needing the full complexity (or price tag) of HubSpot.

Don't be a fool, use this tool

Listen, I love Flodesk because I love simplicity.
